name: Vessel Basin
summary: The Vessel Basin in Silver is a premium, travel-friendly storage container engineered from anodized aircraft-grade aluminium.
description: The Vessel Basin in Silver is a premium, travel-friendly storage container engineered from anodized aircraft-grade aluminium. The Vessel Basin functions as a universal dry herb storage solution and integrates seamlessly into any accessory lineup. It is not a vaporiser or charging component — its sole purpose is to protect, preserve, and conceal stored contents. Its durable construction makes it a strong add-on for retail bundles, starter kits, or everyday carry accessories. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
